titleStmt.title: SII 17.94: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 94.

summary.p: On a pillar in the maṇḍapa in front of the Narasimhasvāmin shrine in the Kallēśvara temple.

This is dated in the cyclic year Viśvāvasu, Puś�a, ba. 10, Sunday. On palaeographical grounds the record may be assigned to about the 11th century. The given details correspond to 1065 A.D., December 25.

It registers a gift of lands to god Sadāśivadēva, by Sadāśiva, son of Gōpaṇṇa, Gōmena Viṭṭhaṇṇa, Parimitana Nāchaṇṇa, and Kōḷagada Chavuḍayya, of the village Bāguḷi, a Hariśchandradatti. The gift was made into the hands of the fifty mahājanas of the village.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu viśvā�su saṁvatsarada puśya
ba 10 Ā . dalu śrīmatu haraścaṁdradattiya
bāguḷiya śrīmadaśēśa mahājanaṁgaḷu śrī
matu sadāśivadēvariga yaṁgabhōga raṁgabhō
gake biṭṭa dha¨rmma kaḍemaneya gōsaṁṇana maga sadā
siva koṭṭa tōṭa kaṁba 100 gōṁmena viṭhṭhaṁṇa ko
ṭṭatōṭa kaṁba 20 parimitana nācaṁṇa koṭṭa E
rekeyi matta 1 kōḷagada caUḍayya koṭṭa
kayi va tta 2 mane 1 yī dha¨rmmavanu yayvadiṁ
baru pratipālisuvaru maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 17.94 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
